# Copilot Instructions

## General

- Use TypeScript
- Use functional React components
- Prefer concise code
- Prefer readability over abstraction

---

## Next.js

- Prefer Server Components
- Only use "use client" when necessary
- Use App Router conventions
- Prefer async server functions

---

## Styling

- Use Tailwind CSS
- Reuse shadcn/ui component or existing styles/components
- Keep UI consistent
- Prefer mobile-first layout

---

## Components

- Keep components small
- Avoid deeply nested JSX
- Avoid unnecessary hooks
- Avoid over-engineering

---

## TypeScript

- Avoid any
- Prefer explicit types for props
- Use type inference when reasonable

---

## Performance

- Avoid unnecessary rerenders
- Avoid large dependencies
- Optimize for fast page load

---

## Code Style

- Use clear variable names
- Prefer early return
- Avoid deeply nested conditionals
- Keep files readable

---

## Output Preference

- Generate production-ready code
- Minimize unnecessary comments
- Follow existing project patterns
